caption: A news broadcast features a group of men standing together in what appears to be a press conference or public gathering. In the center, a man in a white shirt and glasses is speaking into a cluster of microphones, including one with a "भारत" logo. To his right stands a man in a dark jacket and glasses, and to his left is a man wearing a beige scarf. The scene remains largely static across the sequence, with the men maintaining their positions as they face the press. The screen is heavily overlaid with graphics from "NEWS 18 इंडिया". A red news ticker at the bottom reads "PM मोदी ने हीट कर नीतीश कुमार को बधाई दी" and displays a time of "10:03 PM". The top of the screen features various headlines, including "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?", and small inset portraits of political figures such as "विजय चौधरी" and "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार".
